info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Video Analyzer Resource Provider
info.description: Azure Video Analyzer resource provider API definition.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Generates A Streaming Token Which Can Be Used For Accessing Content From Video Content Urls

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Video name.

request.description: Generates a streaming token which can be used for accessing content from video content URLs, for a video resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Retrieves An Existing Video Resource

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Video name.

request.description: Retrieves an existing video resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Creates A New Video Resource Or Updates An Existing One

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Video name.

request.description: Creates a new video resource or updates an existing video resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Created
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Deletes An Existing Video Resource And Its Underlying Data

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Video name.

request.description: Deletes an existing video resource and its underlying data. This operation is irreversible.

response.name: Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Updates Individual Properties Of An Existing Video Resource

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Video name.

request.description: Updates individual properties of an existing video resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Retrieves All Existing Video Resources

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.

request.description: Retrieves a list of video resources that have been created, along with their JSON representations.

response.name: OK

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.

response.name: Detailed error information.

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Retrieves An Existing Access Policy Resource

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Access Policy name.

request.description: Retrieves an existing access policy resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Creates A New Access Policy Resource Or Updates An Existing One

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Access Policy name.

request.description: Creates a new access policy resource or updates an existing one with the given name.

response.name: OK
Created
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Deletes An Existing Access Policy Resource

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Access Policy name.

request.description: Deletes an existing access policy resource with the given name.

response.name: Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Updates Individual Properties Of An Existing Access Policy Resource

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.
(Required) The Access Policy name.

request.description: Updates individual properties of an existing access policy resource with the given name.

response.name: OK
Detailed error information.

item.name: Microsoft Azure List All Existing Access Policy Resources

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure Video Analyzer account name.

request.description: Retrieves all existing access policy resources, along with their JSON representations.

response.name: OK

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.

response.name: Detailed error information.

query.description: Specifies a non-negative integer n that limits the number of items returned from a collection. The service returns the number of available items up to but not greater than the specified value n.
